center.name: 瓦亞加河
center.summary: 瓦亞加河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括Maroon-tailed parakeet、Bluish-slate antshrike、北方藍灰蟻鵙等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The bay hornero is found in the western Amazon Basin along the rios Huallaga, Ucayali, and Napo in Peru, and through extreme southern Colombia and western Brazil along the upper Amazon (rio Solimões). A sight record in Ecuador leads the South American Classification Committee of the American Ornithological Society to call it hypothetical in that country. The bay hornero primarily inhabits middle-aged river islands that undergo annual flooding, typically in stands of Cecropia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: intermedius is found in central Peru from south of the Amazon and east of the Huallaga River south to Junín

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: berlepschi, the eastern slope of the Andes from Morona-Santiago Province in Ecuador to the Huallaga River valley in northern Peru The maroon-tailed parakeet inhabits the canopy and edges of a variety of landscapes including wet lowland premontane forest, cloudforest, várzea, terra firme, and also partially cleared areas

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is likely also present in the remote and poorly-explored region north of Río Huallaga along the eastern slope of the Andes. It inhabits wet shrub forest and montane forest, but might prefer shrub-line vegetation interspersed with open tussock grassland in areas where it occurs alongside Tschudi's tapaculo

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: huallagae is found only in the Huallaga River watershed in northern Peru's Department of San Martín. The northern slaty antshrike inhabits a variety of forested and wooded landscapes, where it favors the understorey to mid-storey
